contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 15
- Description: Root-caused and fixed dao_members.json regression (only key-holders appearing instead of all 409 contributors).
  
  Investigated commit history across TrueSightDAO/treasury-cache to identify two deployment versions of the same GAS script (DaoMembersCache.js) running concurrently. The sentiment_importer default webhook URL pointed to deployment @19 (pre-Pass-2 code) which only seeded from the Signatures sheet (~18 contributors), while the cron trigger ran @HEAD which included the Pass-2 Contact sheet seeding (~409 contributors).
  
  Used clasp to update all 6 stale GAS deployments (deployment IDs: @12, @18, @19, @20, @21, @22) to the latest code with the two-pass merge that seeds ALL names from Contributors contact information. Same URLs, now running latest code. No config changes needed.
  
  Verified: all 8 deployments now at @23-@29 (HEAD/latest) with contributor-all-names seeding.
- Contributor(s): Deep Seek
- TDG Issued: 25.00
